summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.behavior; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.Set; public class BehaviorProfile { private final Set<BehaviorTrait> traits = new HashSet<>(); public void addTrait(BehaviorTrait trait) { traits.add(trait); } public boolean hasTrait(BehaviorTrait trait) { return traits.contains(trait); } public Set<BehaviorTrait> getTraits() { return traits; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
